title: read
text: read Set the access mode. USYS$INF_PARAMS read { write | only } Use Informix does not allow an access mode set to read write combined with isolation level set to ansi read uncommitted . Description The access mode is set after each transaction with the SET TRANSACTION SQL statement. The INF connector does not set a default access mode. When this option is not present, no access mode is set. For more information on the access modes, refer to your Informix documentation. Related Links IsolationLevel Set the isolation level at which the application will run. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
